lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Domain-originated async work is created before generic queue submission.
required_carrier_state: raw work_struct is embedded or referenced
caller fields are unset until freeze
lifetime_rows.authority_check: No authority is granted by allocation.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: No BudgetTicket is consumed by allocation.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: Carrier is not yet pending and cannot be coalesced.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Carrier can be discarded without monitor revoke claim.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: No retry state exists.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch names carrier owner, allocation context, and free owner before adding fields.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Caller submits Domain-originated work.
lifetime_rows.authority_check: Caller authority is frozen before queue_work_on() can observe pending state.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Caller BudgetTicket or split child ticket is reserved before enqueue.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: Frozen fields become immutable across pending coalescing.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Revoke generation must be comparable to carrier generation.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Retry must preserve or explicitly replace the frozen carrier through a monitor-approved path.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch defines immutable frozen fields and memory ordering before queue submission.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Service callback or endpoint target is known.
lifetime_rows.authority_check: Service authority alone is insufficient; endpoint authority is service intersect caller.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Service-local work is not charged as caller work unless a caller ticket exists.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: Service binding cannot modify caller frozen fields on pending work.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Service binding must be invalidated if carrier generation is stale.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Retry cannot upgrade service-only authority into caller authority.
forbidden_collapses: service Domain permission alone as full authority
LSM allow result as frozen carrier
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch has a service/caller intersection table before endpoint side effects.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Carrier is frozen and generic work is submitted.
lifetime_rows.authority_check: queue_work_on() success is scheduling state, not monitor admission receipt.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Budget is reserved before enqueue; enqueue does not mint budget.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: If queue_work_on() returns false, first carrier remains authoritative for the pending work.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Queued carrier remains subject to revoke before execution.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Requeue must keep or explicitly replace carrier through a modeled path.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch defines enqueue success, enqueue false, and enqueue failure carrier outcomes.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: The same work item is already pending or delayed work is modified.
required_carrier_state: second caller handled separately or rejected
lifetime_rows.authority_check: Pending bit does not identify the caller and cannot authorize merge.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Second caller budget cannot be charged for first caller work unless a modeled merge exists.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: Pending coalescing preserves the first carrier or rejects the second submission.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Delayed-work retiming must not hide stale generation.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Retiming is not receipt renewal.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch includes queue_work false and mod_delayed_work_on behavior table.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Queued work is selected or pending is cleared before callback execution.
required_carrier_state: worker has not consumed authority yet
lifetime_rows.authority_check: Assignment to worker and pending clear are not authority checks.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: No budget is consumed until execution side effects are admitted.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: No caller fields may change after pending protection begins.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Stale or revoked carrier must be terminally rejected before callback.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: No retry refresh occurs in pending protection.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch names the pre-callback stale-carrier rejection point.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Worker is about to invoke callback.
lifetime_rows.authority_check: worker current, worker struct, and current_func are not caller authority.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Caller ticket is charged or settled at the admitted side-effect boundary.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: Execution consumes the preserved first carrier.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Execution cannot proceed after revoke generation mismatch.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Retry decision after callback cannot refresh authority.
forbidden_collapses: callback invocation as receipt consumption proof
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch rejects worker identity authority and names the intersection check.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Flush, cancel, or monitor revoke races with pending or executing work.
required_carrier_state: cancel state separate from monitor revoke receipt
stale carrier rejected before side effects or settled after in-flight execution
lifetime_rows.authority_check: cancel/flush synchronizes Linux work; it does not mint RevokeReceipt.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Canceled carrier budget is refunded or settled by explicit rule.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: Cancel cannot let a later caller inherit the first carrier.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Monitor revoke receipt is required for authority invalidation claim.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Retry after cancel/revoke requires a new or still-valid carrier.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch has queued, running, canceled, flushed, and revoked state table.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Work is requeued, delayed, or self-resubmitted.
required_carrier_state: old carrier still valid or explicitly replaced
budget continuation or new split recorded
lifetime_rows.authority_check: Requeue is not receipt renewal.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Repeated execution cannot double-charge or avoid caller budget settlement.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: Self-requeue preserves or regenerates carrier by explicit rule.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Requeued stale carrier must be rejected.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Retry path cannot create authority from worker context.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch covers self-requeue and delayed retiming with generation/budget rules.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Callback returns or flush observes completion.
required_carrier_state: receipt shadow invalidated or retained by explicit rule
lifetime_rows.authority_check: Callback return and flush completion are not monitor verification.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Budget settlement is explicit and auditable.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: Completion does not validate previously coalesced second callers.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Completion after revoke needs explicit in-flight settlement semantics.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Completion can schedule retry only through valid carrier rules.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch defines completion, settlement, and audit record semantics.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Carrier lifetime ends after cancel, completion, or rejection.
required_carrier_state: no worker can still consume carrier
refs are zero or ownership is unique
lifetime_rows.authority_check: Freeing memory is not revoke receipt.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Budget has already been settled or refunded before free.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: No pending work references freed carrier.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Free after revoke cannot race with stale worker consumption.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Retry cannot reference freed carrier.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch proves no pending/running worker path can access freed carrier.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: io_kiocb is allocated for an SQE.
lifetime_rows.authority_check: Request allocation grants no CapSched authority.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: No caller ticket is consumed by allocation.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: No io-wq enqueue has occurred.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Request can fail before carrier authority exists.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: No reissue state exists.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch names request carrier field or attached object and its cache/free behavior.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: SQE is consumed and request fields are initialized.
lifetime_rows.authority_check: req->tctx and req->creds are not caller Domain authority.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Budget is reserved before async punt or side effects.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: Request-specific carrier is immutable once frozen.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Carrier generation is comparable to revoke generation.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Retry cannot refresh this carrier without explicit rule.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch defines freeze point relative to io_init_req() and SQE copy.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Request binds file, fixed file, or registered buffer resources.
required_carrier_state: object/resource authority separate from registration liveness
lifetime_rows.authority_check: io_rsrc_node lookup/refcount is not EndpointCap authority.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Resource binding does not mint CPU or endpoint budget.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: Registered-resource updates cannot mutate in-flight request carrier silently.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Resource revoke must invalidate stale request generation.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Retry must re-check resource generation if request can re-enter.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch separates resource liveness, endpoint capability, and monitor receipt fields.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Request is async-punted or enqueued to io-wq.
lifetime_rows.authority_check: io_queue_iowq() is transport, not monitor receipt admission.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Caller ticket is already reserved before io-wq enqueue.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: io-wq enqueue does not coalesce caller authority through worker identity.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Queued request remains revocable before worker issue.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Async punt does not renew authority.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch defines what happens if async enqueue races with revoke or tctx exit.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Request participates in links, async punt, or reissue paths.
required_carrier_state: linked request semantics do not merge authorities
reissue preserves or regenerates carrier explicitly
lifetime_rows.authority_check: Linking or reissue is not receipt renewal.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Linked or reissued work cannot escape caller ticket settlement.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: io_uring links do not turn multiple requests into one ambient authority.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Stale linked or reissued request is rejected before side effects.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: REQ_F_REISSUE path repeats generation checks.
forbidden_collapses: linked request as shared carrier without model
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch covers linked requests, reissue, and per-request carrier ownership.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: io-wq worker selects request work before issue.
lifetime_rows.authority_check: worker->cur_work and current worker context are not caller authority.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: No endpoint side effects until caller ticket is valid.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: Selected work cannot inherit a different caller from worker context.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Stale or revoked carrier rejected before io_wq_submit_work() issues.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Worker selection does not refresh retry authority.
forbidden_collapses: io-wq worker identity as caller provenance
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch names pre-io_wq_submit_work stale rejection point.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Request is about to issue opcode side effects.
lifetime_rows.authority_check: def->issue() is side effect; it must be preceded by carrier validation.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Caller budget is charged at or before side-effect admission.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: Execution consumes this request's carrier, not ambient worker authority.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Execution cannot proceed after revoke mismatch.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Retry decision after issue cannot renew receipt by itself.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch locates exact pre-issue validation for inline and io-wq paths.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Async cancel, context cancel, task exit, or monitor revoke targets request.
required_carrier_state: Linux cancel match separate from monitor revoke receipt
carrier generation invalidated by monitor-owned receipt
lifetime_rows.authority_check: cancel_seq and IO_WQ_WORK_CANCEL are not monitor RevokeReceipt.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Canceled request budget is refunded or settled by explicit rule.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: Cancel cannot let another request inherit stale carrier state.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Monitor revoke completion must order against pending, running, linked, and reissued requests.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Retry after cancel/revoke requires current generation.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch has cancel/revoke table for pending, running, linked, reissued, completed, and freed requests.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Request is retried or reissued after partial issue.
required_carrier_state: carrier still valid or explicitly renewed by monitor-owned path
lifetime_rows.authority_check: REQ_F_REISSUE is not receipt refresh.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Retry cannot double-charge or bypass caller ticket settlement.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: Reissue remains request-specific.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Reissued stale carrier is rejected before new side effects.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Retry repeats freshness checks.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch covers retry/reissue freshness and budget settlement.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Request posts CQE or enters completion batching/free path.
required_carrier_state: result delivery separate from receipt authority
lifetime_rows.authority_check: CQE posting is result delivery, not monitor verification.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Budget settlement is explicit before completion is treated as final.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: Completion does not validate linked or retried stale carriers.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Completion after revoke follows in-flight settlement rules.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: Completion and retry are mutually explicit states.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch separates CQE result, receipt state, and audit/settlement state.

lifetime_rows.entry_condition: Request carrier, resource refs, and async data are released.
required_carrier_state: no worker/retry/completion path can still consume carrier
resource refs released after authority settlement
carrier memory not reused with stale receipt
lifetime_rows.authority_check: Resource ref drop and request free are not revoke receipts.
lifetime_rows.budget_rule: Budget is settled/refunded before carrier free.
lifetime_rows.coalescing_rule: No linked or retried request references freed carrier.
lifetime_rows.revoke_rule: Free after revoke cannot race with stale worker consumption.
lifetime_rows.retry_rule: REQ_F_REISSUE cannot reference freed carrier.
lifetime_rows.patch_precondition: Patch sketch proves no pending worker, task_work, linked, retry, or completion path can access freed carrier.
